meaning: n.[动] 蚝卵,口角,掌击vi.一巴掌打去,争吵
examples: She took a mouthful of food and then suddenly spat it out.
The only thing he spat out was the main-mast, for it stuck in his teeth.
The spat robs both Apple and NBC of revenue as the crucial fall TV season begins.
It said many people did not realise being spat at or slapped was a crime.
